---
name: lego-design
description: 'Lego design system for Lego Loco Cluster. Covers brand colors (#00A651, #C4281C, #FFD700, #0055BF), typography, instance card states, responsive 3x3 grid, and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility.'
---

# Lego Design Skill

## When to Use
- Applying Lego brand colors
- Typography and spacing decisions
- Instance card state design (7 states)
- Responsive 3×3 grid layout
- Accessibility audit

## Lego Colors
- Green #00A651 (success), Red #C4281C (error), Yellow #FFD700 (warning), Blue #0055BF (primary)

## Card States: loading, connecting, streaming, error, offline, paused, selected

## Key Files
- `frontend/tailwind.config.js` — theme
- `frontend/src/App.jsx` — layout

## Procedure
1. Review current UI for design consistency
2. Check `docs/knowledge/design/` for design system docs
3. Create or update design specifications
4. Audit accessibility
5. Document in `docs/knowledge/design/<date>-<topic>.md`

## Tasks: D1 (design system doc), D2 (accessibility audit), D3 (card state specs)
